posts.author: Grosshanten (Jonah Grosshanten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Everyone,

I was wondering if there is a ways to use a Stylus as Input.

Context: We are a construction company and many of our employees use the Monday iPad app.
They always have to fill out forms. Is there a way that they can use the Apple Pencil to do it?

Kind regards and Thank you

Jonah
